scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,preload,main -c cyan,yellow,blue "npm run dev --workspace=apps/renderer" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/preload" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/main"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=apps/preload && npm run build --workspace=apps/main && npm run build --workspace=apps/renderer
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n renderer,preload,main,electron -c cyan,yellow,blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=apps/renderer" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/preload" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/main" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && sleep 5 && electron apps/main"
